start journey equipment resources

equipment

(click on the images to see larger versions, use your browser's back button)

acoustic cello

I inherited my acoustic cello from my grandfather. It was built by Neuner & Hornsteiner in Mittenwald, 1908

electric cello

I have a NXT5a electric cello, here is a video that was helpful for my decision

electric gear

more details coming later, for the moment just a quick list

  • headphone amp: NUX Mighty Plug Pro, I use it most of the time as it is such an easy setup - just plug in my headphones in the 3.5mm jack and start, features IR (impulse response) and can be used as an USB interface to get the digital output of the device directly to a DAW (recording computer)
  • multi effects processor: Harley Benton DNAfx GiT, I bought it with the electric cello, was curious about trying various effects, wanted to use it also as preamp (which is possible but not ideal), don't use it very much currently
  • Looper pedal: BOSS RC-500
disclaimer
